Effect version: 3.19.19

/.src/schemaUnionOfLiterals.ts(5,33): warning TS377038: This `Schema.Union` contains multiple `Schema.Literal` members and can be simplified to a single `Schema.Literal` call. effect(schemaUnionOfLiterals)


==== /.src/schemaUnionOfLiterals.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-v3
    // @effect-diagnostics schemaUnionOfLiterals:warning
    import { Schema } from "effect"
    
    export const thisShouldReport = Schema.Union(Schema.Literal("A"), Schema.Literal("B"))
                                    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377038: This `Schema.Union` contains multiple `Schema.Literal` members and can be simplified to a single `Schema.Literal` call. effect(schemaUnionOfLiterals)
    
    export const noSenseForSingleMemberUnion = Schema.Union(Schema.Literal("A"))
